3132550.name: Fuga: Melodies of Steel (Manga) Vol. 2
3132550.description:
*Identical DLC is available for all games in the Fuga: Melodies of Steel series. Please be careful not to buy duplicates.

Volume 2 of the comicalized Fuga: Melodies of Steel!

Story:
The cycle of revenge never ends...
Malt and his friends press on in the fight against the Berman Army, piloting the colossal tank Taranis to save their families. Along the way, they encounter fellow children, Chick, Hack, Sheena, and Jin, all sharing the same desperate plight. Amidst the journey, a mysterious, ghostly voice begins to echo within the Taranis. What could this be?

Artist:
Original Story: CyberConnect2
Manga: Takafumi Adachi
His representative works are D・MFighter Honoo, Metal Fight Beyblade, Ballet Hero Fantasy: Dan no bouken, and Anima Gear.

Specs: .pdf file, B6, Monochrome, 101 Pages
